---
title: "Hornbeam (Carpinus betulus)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Carpinus*](/trees/genus/carpinus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 26 — Hornbeam](../26.html) |  |
| [Tree 27 — Hornbeam](../27.html) |  |
| [Tree 59 - Hornbeam](../59.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 60 - Hornbeam](../60.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 61 - Hornbeam](../61.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 141 — Hornbeam](../141.html) |  |
| [Tree 301 — Hornbeam](../301.html) |  |
| [Tree 302 — Hornbeam](../302.html) |  |
| [Tree 303 — Hornbeam](../303.html) |  |
| [Tree 305 — Hornbeam](../305.html) |  |
| [Tree 307 — Hornbeam](../307.html) |  |
| [Tree 309 — Hornbeam](../309.html) |  |
| [Tree 311 — Hornbeam](../311.html) |  |
| [Tree 313 — Hornbeam](../313.html) |  |
| [Tree 314 — Hornbeam](../314.html) |  |
| [Tree 316 — Hornbeam](../316.html) |  |
| [Tree 330 — Hornbeam](../330.html) |  |
| [Tree 345 — Hornbeam](../345.html) |  |
| [Tree 347 — Hornbeam](../347.html) |  |
| [Tree 351 — Hornbeam](../351.html) |  |
| [Tree 355 — Hornbeam](../355.html) |  |
| [Tree 360 — Hornbeam](../360.html) |  |
| [Tree 361 — Hornbeam](../361.html) |  |
